channel.title: nsurl on Andy Ibanez
channel.description: Recent content in nsurl on Andy Ibanez

item.title: Building URLs With NSURLComponents
item.description: Building URLs with NSURLComponents If you have been programming for Apple platforms for a while, chances are you have seen (or maybe even wrote yourself) a line of code that looks like this: let url = URL(string: "https://www.google.com/search?hl=en&q=pullip")! Whether you wrote it yourself or someone else did it, one thing is clear: This is not a safe way to build URLs. Can you know, for sure, that your URL is actually valid?
